the review seems to be a bit confusing. the reviewer mentions not having read the entire book and thought they were getting the story of the deer, which they believe is the story of bambi by felix salten. they clarify that this book is about a young adult named bambina and that they gave it five stars to avoid judging the story wrongly. the tone of the review is more neutral than negative or positive.

the reviewer's intention is to express that they are not sure about the content of the book but are giving it a high rating to avoid any misjudgment. the overall sentiment is not clearly negative or positive, but it leans more towards a neutral or cautious positive. the review does not contain any strong negative language and the reviewer is open to the possibility that the book might be good.
